title: T's Craft Fixes
description: Fixes odd math in Minecraft's recipes to reduce grinding while keeping balance.
body:
## T's Craft Fixes
### A data pack made by T to fix Minecraft's odd math for some recipes and help reduce game grinding.

Custom crafts version for items featured in the We Are The Boredom Minecraft server is only available for 1.21.4 or earlier. Custom items require the [T's Custom Textures resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ts-textures) and are available there for post 1.21.4 versions.

### List of all craft fixes (Latest version)
| Minecraft Item           | Change/status             |
|--------------------------|---------------------------|
| All Buttons              | Now give 16               |
| All Signs                | Now give 12               |
| All Doors                | Now give 8                |
| Stick                    | Now give 8                |
| Chest                    | Option to craft with logs |
| All Fences               | Now give 16               |
| All Walls                | Now give 12 (Still WIP)   |
| All Fence Gates          | Now give 8                |
| All Pressure Plates      | Now give 8                |
| All Walls (Stonecutting) | Now give 2                |

Using [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/crafting-tweaks/) is highly recommended as well!

*All gallary images use [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound), [rotorBLOCKS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rotrblocks), and [T's Custom Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ts-textures). More to come in the future!*
